rules.name: transitivity
rules.pattern: Adj a b ∧ Adj b c → Adj a c
rules.description: If a connects to b and b connects to c, then a can reach c

rules.name: symmetry
rules.pattern: Adj a b → Adj b a

rules.name: reachability_via_path
rules.pattern: ∃ p : G.Walk u v, p.length ≥ 1 → G.Reachable u v
rules.description: A walk of positive length witnesses reachability

rules.name: connected_component_closure
rules.pattern: G.Reachable u v → connectedComponent G u = connectedComponent G v
rules.description: Reachable nodes share a connected component

rules.name: high_confidence_edge
rules.pattern: gnn_score a b ≥ 0.7 → Candidate a b
rules.description: GNN edges above confidence threshold become symbolic candidates
